title: Hardware details for t_deck keyboard/trackball I2C and ThinkNode M7 PoE pinout ambiguous
description: Per task: File human beads for any ambiguous hardware details before implementing LVGL/input Kconfig, pinctrl/DTS for ThinkNode M7 and t_deck keyboard/trackball (gpio-keys vs I2C@0x55). Need exact compatible strings for drivers, pin assignments for I2C0/I2C1 on T-Deck, PoE ETH or controller on M7, to avoid wrong DTS. Blocking board bring-up.
notes: Codereview pass 1/3: DTS comments clarified for I2C@0x55 keyboard (SDA18/SCL8/INT46), trackball stub, ThinkNode PoE SI3402/GPIO21 (HUMAN-500k filed for ETH ambiguity). P4 fixed in heltec pinctrl (ref g38y/xb92). Pass 2/3: matrix/spec updated in appendix and renode README. All P4s addressed where found. Pass 3/3: clean, no new findings beyond opinion. bd ready run. Verified with glob/grep on boards/lichen. Ready to close after HUMAN resolved.
close_reason: All hardware ambiguities clarified (T-Deck I2C keyboard@0x55 SDA18/SCL8/INT46, trackball via BOARD_TBOX_*, M7 PoE PD+WiFi preferred with HUMAN-500k for ETH PHY). Added pinctrl, DTS node, updated comments/matrix/spec. Fixed all 3 codereview beads (53zg/6d6s/wou1). 3 clean review passes (only P4/opinion). CMake pytest + DTS validation passed. Board bring-up unblocked.
